rationale: The citing paper explicitly studies stage-wise value creation from raw idea to final design to market outcomes, and its research gap centers on how early idea quality translates into innovation success. The cited paper is directly about idea-level “conversion ability” from invention to launched product, with constructs (focus, speed, expertise, idea importance) that plausibly inform that same conversion mechanism. Given this strong conceptual overlap in titles/notes, this is not an obvious incidental mention.
